form.formComment: At the latest run favourite; won by 1.0 len at this track Cg&E Bm62 March 20 over 1200m defeating Titan Of Choice carrying 56kg at $3.10. form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation second last in a small field at Caulfield Heath Bm66 November 19 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Tennessee Bound with 57.5kg at $14. First up last campaign second of 10 at Kilmore Cl1 September 29 over 1110m, 0.5 len behind Marilyn's Edge with 59kg at $3.10. Has ability, respect any support.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 11 at Yarra Valley Bm56 on March 24 over 1000m, slow going head behind Mystery Blonde with 63.5kg at $3.70. The start before that raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 11 at Moe Bm56 on February 22 over 1000m, 0.9 len behind Stahnado with 63.5kg at $8.50. Should be thereabouts again.
